questions.question: Explain the difference between connectionless and connection-oriented link control protocols. Provide an example of each protocol.
questions.hint: Describe the characteristics of each protocol

questions.question: What is framing in the context of link control? Describe how it is used in Ethernet and HDLC protocols.
Compare and contrast flow control and error control in link control protocols. Provide an example of how a protocol might use both.
questions.hint: Describe the mechanisms used for each
